# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

{
  "$schema": "https://schema.management.azure.com/schemas/2019-04-01/deploymentTemplate.json#",
  "contentVersion": "1.0.0.0",
  "parameters": {
    "vmName": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "MyVm"
    },
    "vmSize": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "Standard_DS2_v2"
    },
    "adminUsername": {
      "type": "string",
      "defaultValue": "myAdminUser"
    },
    "adminPassword": {
      "type": "secureString",
      "defaultValue": "mySecurePassword"
    }
  },
  "resources": [
    {
      "name": "[parameters('vmName')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-30",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "hardwareProfile": {
          "vmSize": "[parameters('vmSize')]"
        },
        "osProfile": {
          "computerName": "[parameters('vmName')]",
          "adminUsername": "[parameters('adminUsername')]",
          "adminPassword": {
            "value": "[parameters('adminPassword')]"
          }
        },
        "networkProfile": {
          "networkInterfaces": [
            {
              "id": "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', parameters('vmName'))]"
            }
          ]
        }
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', parameters('vmName'))]",
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces', parameters('vmName'))]"
      ]
    },
    {
      "name": "[parameters('vmName')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-30",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "publicIPAllocationMethod": "Static"
      }
    },
    {
      "name": "[parameters('vmName')]",
      "type": "Microsoft.Network/networkInterfaces",
      "apiVersion": "2020-06-30",
      "location": "[resourceGroup().location]",
      "properties": {
        "ipConfigurations": [
          {
            "name": "MyIPConfiguration",
            "properties": {
              "privateIPAddress": "[parameters('vmName')].Private IP address",
              "privateIPAllocationMethod": "Dynamic"
            }
          }
        ]
      },
      "dependsOn": [
        "[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', parameters('vmName'))]"
      ]
    }
  ],
  "outputs": {
    "publicIPAddress": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[reference(resourceId('Microsoft.Network/publicIPAddresses', parameters('vmName')), '2020-06-30').dnsSettings.fqdn]"
    },
    "fqdn": {
      "type": "string",
      "value": "[concat(parameters('vmName'), '.', resourceGroup().name, '.cloudapp.azure.com')]"
    }
  }
}
